sentences.sentence: Textbooks are shelved along the back wall.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant cluster (-lved) and word-final consonants (back, wall)

sentences.sentence: The front counter handles refunds and special orders.
sentences.phonetic_focus: compound noun stress (front counter) and cluster (-nts in refunds, -rs in orders)

sentences.sentence: School supplies and notebooks are stocked in the side aisle.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-pplies, -cked) and linking (stocked_in)

sentences.sentence: You can rent your course texts from the study room desk.
sentences.structure: declarative with prepositional phrase and direct address
sentences.phonetic_focus: compound noun stress (study room) and cluster (texts, -rse in course)

sentences.sentence: Discounted items are arranged on the carts near the windows.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clusters (-nts in items, -rts in carts) and reduced syllable (arranged)

sentences.sentence: If you cannot find a title on the shelves, the staff at the desk will look it up for you.
sentences.structure: fronted conditional clause plus wayfinding pointer
sentences.phonetic_focus: linked speech across clause boundary (find_a, look_it_up) and final clusters (shelves, staff)

sentences.sentence: Before you head to the registers, check the wall map for the exact aisle of your department's books.
sentences.structure: fronted temporal clause with comma split and wayfinding pointer
sentences.phonetic_focus: final consonant clusters at phrase boundaries (-rs in registers, -pt in department's) and stress-timing across a long sentence

sentences.sentence: Sign-in sheets are by the door.
sentences.phonetic_focus: word-final consonants (sheets, door) and cluster (-ts in sheets)

sentences.sentence: Resume samples are posted here.
sentences.phonetic_focus: cluster (-sted in posted) and clear vowel distinction (here)

sentences.sentence: Please take a name tag.
sentences.phonetic_focus: word-final consonants (take, tag) and linking (take_a)

sentences.sentence: Our advisors review cover letters every Wednesday afternoon.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced syllable (Wednesday) and clusters (-rs in advisors, -rs in letters)

sentences.sentence: Mock interviews are scheduled through the online portal.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-cks in mock, -led in scheduled) and linking (scheduled_through)

sentences.sentence: You can print extra copies at the front desk.
sentences.structure: declarative with prepositional phrase and direct address
sentences.phonetic_focus: clusters (print, -pies in copies) and compound noun stress (front desk)

sentences.sentence: If you need help finding a room, check the schedule on the board for today's session times.
sentences.structure: fronted conditional clause with comma split and wayfinding pointer
sentences.phonetic_focus: linked speech across clause boundary (if you_need, help_finding) and final clusters (board, times)

sentences.sentence: Shopping baskets are stacked by the door.
sentences.phonetic_focus: cluster (-cked in stacked) and word-final consonants (baskets, door)

sentences.sentence: Fresh produce is on your right.
sentences.phonetic_focus: cluster (-sh in fresh) and linking (is_on)

sentences.sentence: Frozen meals are kept in the back freezers.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced syllable (frozen) and clusters (meals, -zers in freezers)

sentences.sentence: Our weekly specials run through the end of the month.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking (run_through) and reduced function words (through the, of the)

sentences.sentence: The bakery section is included in our morning deliveries.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking (is_included) and reduced syllables (bakery, deliveries)

sentences.sentence: You can find the dairy items along the far wall.
sentences.structure: declarative with prepositional phrase and direct address
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced function words (to your, find the) and clusters (-ms in items)

sentences.sentence: If you cannot find an item, check the overhead signs for the aisle numbers and category labels.
sentences.structure: fronted conditional clause with comma split and wayfinding pointer
sentences.phonetic_focus: linked speech across clause boundary (find_an, check_the) and final clusters (signs, labels, numbers)
